cellOrdering: row-major fixed records, zero-based in web clients

gridGeometry.cellCenterFormula: lat = topEdgeLatitude - (row + 0.5) * cellSizeLatitude; lon360 = westEdgeLongitude360 + (col + 0.5) * cellSizeLongitude
